2484 }
2485
2486 if (NMassSheets <= 0 || params.MassMapNSIDE <= 0)
2487 return; /* feature disabled or not initialized */
2488 if (is_first_segment)
2489 return; /* need previous segment for crossings */
2490
2491 /* STEP 1: select replication candidates overlapping this segment radial span */
2492 mass_maps_select_segment_replications(segment_index);
2493
2494 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
2495 {
2496 int show = MassMapSegmentReplicationCount < 10 ? MassMapSegmentReplicationCount : 10;
2497 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS: segment %d z=%g replication candidates %d/%d :",
2498 fdate(), segment_index, z_segment,
2499 MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, plc.Nreplications);
2500 for (int i = 0; i < show; ++i)
2501 printf(" %d", MassMapSegmentReplications[i]);
2502 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount > show)
2503 printf(" ...");
2504 printf("\n");
2505 }
2506
2507 /* STEP 2: loop over replications and accumulate entries using products over the FFT tile */
2508 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount <= 0)
2509 return;
2510
2511 /* Segment endpoint redshifts */
2512 double z_prev = ScaleDep.z[segment_index - 1];
2513 double z_curr = z_segment; /* expected to be ScaleDep.z[segment_index] */
2514 /* Optional: displacement histogram at endpoints (compile-time, default OFF) */
2515#ifdef DISP_HISTOGRAM
2516 mass_maps_disp_hist_on_segment(segment_index, z_prev, z_curr);
2517#endif
2518 /* Segment chi bounds */
2519 double chi_prev_seg = ComovingDistance(z_prev);
2520 double chi_curr_seg = ComovingDistance(z_curr);
2521 double seg_chi_min = chi_prev_seg < chi_curr_seg ? chi_prev_seg : chi_curr_seg;
2522 double seg_chi_max = chi_prev_seg > chi_curr_seg ? chi_prev_seg : chi_curr_seg;
2523 /* PLC center (phys) */
2524 double c_phys[3] = {plc.center[0] * params.InterPartDist,
2525 plc.center[1] * params.InterPartDist,
2526 plc.center[2] * params.InterPartDist};
2527
2528 /* Determine LPT order compiled in */
2529 int lpt_order = 1;
2530#ifdef TWO_LPT
2531 lpt_order = 2;
2532#ifdef THREE_LPT
2533 lpt_order = 3;
2534#endif
2535#endif
2536
2537 /* We'll count local crossings per replication and reduce globally */
2538 unsigned long long total_crossings_all_reps = 0ULL;
2539 unsigned long long total_crossings_all_reps_global = 0ULL;
2540#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
2541 /* Diagnostics for ZPLC>ZACC filter: count how many entries were considered and excluded */
2542 unsigned long long zfilter_considered_local = 0ULL;
2543 unsigned long long zfilter_excluded_local = 0ULL;
2544 unsigned long long zfilter_considered_global = 0ULL;
2545 unsigned long long zfilter_excluded_global = 0ULL;
2546 /* Extra diagnostics: track ranges of z_plc and z_acc and check z_plc segment consistency */
2547 double zplc_min_local = 1e99, zplc_max_local = -1e99;
2548 double zacc_min_local = 1e99, zacc_max_local = -1e99;
2549 double zplc_min_global = 0.0, zplc_max_global = 0.0;
2550 double zacc_min_global = 0.0, zacc_max_global = 0.0;
2551 unsigned long long zplc_out_of_segment_local = 0ULL;
2552 unsigned long long zplc_out_of_segment_global = 0ULL;
2553#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
2554 /* Matching diagnostics */
2555 unsigned long long excl_with_group_local = 0ULL;
2556 unsigned long long excl_with_plcgroup_local = 0ULL;
2557 unsigned long long cons_with_plcgroup_local = 0ULL;
2558 unsigned long long excl_with_group_global = 0ULL;
2559 unsigned long long excl_with_plcgroup_global = 0ULL;
2560 unsigned long long cons_with_plcgroup_global = 0ULL;
2561#endif
2562#endif
2563 /* Store local per-rep counts to reduce in one shot */
2564 unsigned long long *rep_crossings_local = NULL;
2565 unsigned long long *rep_crossings_global = NULL;
2566 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount > 0)
2567 {
2568 rep_crossings_local = (unsigned long long *)calloc(MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, sizeof(unsigned long long));
2569 if (!ThisTask)
2570 rep_crossings_global = (unsigned long long *)calloc(MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, sizeof(unsigned long long));
2571 }
2572
2573 /* Precompute scale factor F for set_point (1+z at current segment) */
2574 PRODFLOAT Fseg = (PRODFLOAT)(z_segment + 1.0);
2575
2576 /* Optional: Lagrangian sub-volume culling setup (compile-time controlled) */
2577 int blocks_x = MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_X;
2578 int blocks_y = MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_Y;
2579 int blocks_z = MASS_MAPS_BLOCKS_Z;
2580 /* Unified AABB pad (phys units, same units as InterPartDist = true Mpc):
2581 Variable buffer based on (sigma8, z). We use the empirical form
2582 aabb_pad_phys = FACTOR * (sigma8/0.8)^{1.5} / (1+z)
2583 which is independent of resolution and in true Mpc to match positions formed by
2584 multiplying lattice coordinates by InterPartDist (true Mpc).
2585 */
2586 double aabb_pad_phys = 0.0;
2587 {
2588 double sigma8 = params.Sigma8;
2589 double z_now = z_curr; /* current segment redshift */
2590 double factor = MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_FACTOR;
2591 double h = params.Hubble100;
2592 /* Model defined in Mpc/h: pad_h = factor * (sigma8/0.8)^{1.5} / (1+z).
2593 Convert to true Mpc for internal positions by dividing by h. */
2594 aabb_pad_phys = (factor * pow(sigma8 / 0.8, 1.5) / (1.0 + z_now)) / (h > 0.0 ? h : 1.0); /* true Mpc */
2595 }
2596 /* Per-thread HEALPix accumulators: compile-time toggle */
2597#ifdef MASS_MAPS_THREAD_ACCUM
2598 int thread_accum = 1;
2599#else
2600 int thread_accum = 0;
2601#endif
2602 /* Precompute cos(aperture) for conservative angular culling */
2603 double A = params.PLCAperture;
2604 double cosA = cos(A * (acos(-1.0) / 180.0));
2605 int nx_local = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_x_];
2606 int ny_local = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_y_];
2607 int nz_local = (int)MyGrids[0].GSlocal[_z_];
2608 int gx_start = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_x_];
2609 int gy_start = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_y_];
2610 int gz_start = (int)MyGrids[0].GSstart[_z_];
2611 /* Cap blocks to local sizes */
2612 if (blocks_x > nx_local)
2613 blocks_x = nx_local;
2614 if (blocks_y > ny_local)
2615 blocks_y = ny_local;
2616 if (blocks_z > nz_local)
2617 blocks_z = nz_local;
2618 int culling_enabled = (blocks_x > 0 && blocks_y > 0 && blocks_z > 0);
2619 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
2620 {
2621 double pad_cells = (params.InterPartDist > 0.0) ? (aabb_pad_phys / params.InterPartDist) : 0.0;
2622 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS culling: blocks=(%d,%d,%d) aabb_pad=%.3g Mpc (%.3g cells) enabled=%d (Lagrangian-only)\n",
2623 fdate(), blocks_x, blocks_y, blocks_z, aabb_pad_phys, pad_cells, culling_enabled);
2624 }
2625
2626 /* Last-segment displacement vs buffer diagnostics threshold */
2627 double warn_frac = MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_WARN_FRAC;
2628 int last_segment = (segment_index == NMassSheets);
2629 int collect_disp_stats = (last_segment && (aabb_pad_phys > 0.0));
2630 unsigned long long disp_total_local = 0ULL; /* number of particles evaluated */
2631 unsigned long long disp_exceed_local = 0ULL; /* number with |Pcurr-Pprev| > AABB pad */
2632 double disp_max_local = 0.0; /* maximum |Pcurr-Pprev| observed */
2633 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
2634 {
2635 if (aabb_pad_phys > 0.0)
2636 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS culling: using unified AABB pad phys=%.6g\n", fdate(), aabb_pad_phys);
2637 if (collect_disp_stats)
2638 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS buffer-diag: last segment will collect |x(q,z)-q| stats vs buffer pad=%.6g Mpc (%.6g cells) (warn frac=%.3g)\n",
2639 fdate(), aabb_pad_phys, (aabb_pad_phys / params.InterPartDist), warn_frac);
2640 }
2641 /* Build block edge indices in local coordinates (inclusive ranges per block) */
2642 int *edge_x = NULL, *edge_y = NULL, *edge_z = NULL;
2643 int nbx = 0, nby = 0, nbz = 0;
2644 if (culling_enabled)
2645 {
2646 nbx = blocks_x;
2647 nby = blocks_y;
2648 nbz = blocks_z;
2649 edge_x = (int *)malloc(sizeof(int) * (size_t)(nbx + 1));
2650 edge_y = (int *)malloc(sizeof(int) * (size_t)(nby + 1));
2651 edge_z = (int *)malloc(sizeof(int) * (size_t)(nbz + 1));
2652 if (!edge_x || !edge_y || !edge_z)
2653 {
2654 culling_enabled = 0;
2655 }
2656 else
2657 {
2658 for (int b = 0; b <= nbx; ++b)
2659 edge_x[b] = (int)((long)b * (long)nx_local / (long)nbx);
2660 for (int b = 0; b <= nby; ++b)
2661 edge_y[b] = (int)((long)b * (long)ny_local / (long)nby);
2662 for (int b = 0; b <= nbz; ++b)
2663 edge_z[b] = (int)((long)b * (long)nz_local / (long)nbz);
2664 }
2665 }
2666
2667 /* Precompute box shifts for all replication candidates once
2668 * Rationale: avoids recomputing (ii,jj,kk)*Box for every particle.
2669 */
2670 double Bx = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_] * params.InterPartDist;
2671 double By = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] * params.InterPartDist;
2672 double Bz = MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_] * params.InterPartDist;
2673 double *RepShift = NULL;
2674 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount > 0)
2675 {
2676 RepShift = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * 3 * (size_t)MassMapSegmentReplicationCount);
2677 if (RepShift)
2678 {
2679 for (int ir = 0; ir < MassMapSegmentReplicationCount; ++ir)
2680 {
2681 int rep_id = MassMapSegmentReplications[ir];
2682 int ii = plc.repls[rep_id].i;
2683 int jj = plc.repls[rep_id].j;
2684 int kk = plc.repls[rep_id].k;
2685 RepShift[3 * ir + 0] = ii * Bx;
2686 RepShift[3 * ir + 1] = jj * By;
2687 RepShift[3 * ir + 2] = kk * Bz;
2688 }
2689 }
2690 }
2691
2692 /* Culling-enabled path: iterate blocks first to reuse particle positions across replications
2693 * Hotspot: the inner loops over particles and replications are dominant.
2694 * Current approach uses a per-block cache of positions to reduce recomputation
2695 * and OpenMP over blocks. Map updates default to atomics; an optional per-thread
2696 * accumulator (MASS_MAPS_THREAD_ACCUM) further reduces contention with a final merge.
2697 */
2698 if (culling_enabled && RepShift)
2699 {
2700 int s_map = segment_index - 1;
2701 /* Diagnostics: track block visitation effectiveness */
2702 long long blocks_total = (long long)nbx * (long long)nby * (long long)nbz;
2703 long long blocks_init_count = 0; /* blocks with any particles (AABB initialized) */
2704 long long blocks_skipped_shell = 0; /* initialized blocks rejected by shell test for all reps */
2705 long long blocks_visited = 0; /* initialized blocks with at least one passing replication */
2706 /* Parallelize over blocks; each iteration handles one block fully */
2707#ifdef _OPENMP
2708#pragma omp parallel for collapse(3) schedule(dynamic)
2709#endif
2710 for (int bz = 0; bz < nbz; ++bz)
2711 for (int by = 0; by < nby; ++by)
2712 for (int bx_i = 0; bx_i < nbx; ++bx_i)
2713 {
2714 int kg0_local = edge_z[bz];
2715 int kg1_local = edge_z[bz + 1] - 1;
2716 if (kg1_local < kg0_local)
2717 continue;
2718 int kg0 = gz_start + kg0_local;
2719 int kg1 = gz_start + kg1_local;
2720 int jg0_local = edge_y[by];
2721 int jg1_local = edge_y[by + 1] - 1;
2722 if (jg1_local < jg0_local)
2723 continue;
2724 int jg0 = gy_start + jg0_local;
2725 int jg1 = gy_start + jg1_local;
2726 int ig0_local = edge_x[bx_i];
2727 int ig1_local = edge_x[bx_i + 1] - 1;
2728 if (ig1_local < ig0_local)
2729 continue;
2730 int ig0 = gx_start + ig0_local;
2731 int ig1 = gx_start + ig1_local;
2732 /* Determine whether this block has content to consider */
2733 int block_initialized = 1; /* Lagrangian-only: any non-empty index range is considered initialized */
2734 if (!block_initialized)
2735 continue;
2736#ifdef _OPENMP
2737#pragma omp atomic update
2738#endif
2739 blocks_init_count++;
2740
2741 /* Per-block buffer threshold for diagnostics */
2742 double scale_block = params.InterPartDist;
2743 double thresh_block = aabb_pad_phys;
2744
2745 /* Build replication pass list for this block */
2746 int *rep_pass = (int *)alloca(sizeof(int) * (size_t)MassMapSegmentReplicationCount);
2747 int pass_n = 0;
2748 for (int ir = 0; ir < MassMapSegmentReplicationCount; ++ir)
2749 {
2750 const double *shift = &RepShift[3 * ir];
2751 /* Lagrangian AABB expanded by unified pad (phys units) */
2752 double min_s[3] = {(ig0 + SHIFT) * scale_block, (jg0 + SHIFT) * scale_block, (kg0 + SHIFT) * scale_block};
2753 double max_s[3] = {(ig1 + SHIFT) * scale_block, (jg1 + SHIFT) * scale_block, (kg1 + SHIFT) * scale_block};
2754 /* Effective AABB padding (variable): use per-segment aabb_pad_phys only */
2755 double thresh_block = aabb_pad_phys;
2756 double pad_total = aabb_pad_phys;
2757 for (int a = 0; a < 3; ++a)
2758 {
2759 min_s[a] -= pad_total;
2760 max_s[a] += pad_total;
2761 min_s[a] += shift[a];
2762 max_s[a] += shift[a];
2763 }
2764 double dmin, dmax;
2765 aabb_distance_bounds_to_point(min_s, max_s, c_phys, &dmin, &dmax);
2766 if (dmin > seg_chi_max || dmax < seg_chi_min)
2767 continue; /* radial shell rejects */
2768 /* Conservative angular cull using cosine upper bound:
2769 If max_{box} (u·r/|r|) ≤ cosA, the whole AABB is outside aperture.
2770 Upper bound <= (max_u_dot) / (min_norm). */
2771 double u[3] = {plc.zvers[0], plc.zvers[1], plc.zvers[2]}; /* unit axis */
2772 /* Build relative bounds r = x - c */
2773 double rmin[3] = {min_s[0] - c_phys[0], min_s[1] - c_phys[1], min_s[2] - c_phys[2]};
2774 double rmax[3] = {max_s[0] - c_phys[0], max_s[1] - c_phys[1], max_s[2] - c_phys[2]};
2775 /* max_u_dot: choose per-axis extreme based on sign of u */
2776 double max_u_dot = 0.0;
2777 for (int a = 0; a < 3; ++a)
2778 {
2779 double ra = (u[a] >= 0.0) ? rmax[a] : rmin[a];
2780 max_u_dot += u[a] * ra;
2781 }
2782 /* min_norm = dmin from center to AABB; if center inside (dmin==0), skip angular culling */
2783 int angular_pass = 1;
2784 if (dmin > 0.0)
2785 {
2786 double cos_ub = max_u_dot / dmin;
2787 if (cos_ub <= cosA)
2788 angular_pass = 0; /* definitely outside aperture */
2789 }
2790 if (!angular_pass)
2791 continue;
2792 rep_pass[pass_n++] = ir;
2793 }
2794 if (pass_n == 0)
2795 {
2796#ifdef _OPENMP
2797#pragma omp atomic update
2798#endif
2799 blocks_skipped_shell++;
2800 continue; /* no replication needs this block */
2801 }
2802#ifdef _OPENMP
2803#pragma omp atomic update
2804#endif
2805 blocks_visited++;
2806
2807 /* Prepare buffers for this block's particles (thread-local) */
2808 long nx = (long)(ig1 - ig0 + 1);
2809 long ny = (long)(jg1 - jg0 + 1);
2810 long nz = (long)(kg1 - kg0 + 1);
2811 long nblock = nx * ny * nz;
2812 if (nblock <= 0)
2813 continue;
2814 double *PosPrevBuf = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * 3 * (size_t)nblock);
2815 double *PosCurrBuf = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * 3 * (size_t)nblock);
2816 /* Optional per-thread accumulator for this block to reduce atomics */
2817 double *LocalMap = NULL;
2818 if (thread_accum && MassMapNSIDE_current > 0)
2819 LocalMap = (double *)calloc((size_t)MassMapNPIX, sizeof(double));
2820 unsigned long long ipix_oob_local = 0ULL; /* guard counter */
2821 int use_cache = (PosPrevBuf && PosCurrBuf);
2822 if (use_cache)
2823 {
2824 /* Fill cached positions once */
2825 long idx = 0;
2826 /* Per-block diagnostics */
2827 unsigned long long blk_total = 0ULL, blk_exceed = 0ULL;
2828 double blk_max = 0.0;
2829 for (int ig = ig0; ig <= ig1; ++ig)
2830 {
2831 for (int jg = jg0; jg <= jg1; ++jg)
2832 {
2833 for (int kg = kg0; kg <= kg1; ++kg, ++idx)
2834 {
2835 pos_data obj;
2836 mass_maps_set_point_from_products_global(ig, jg, kg, Fseg, &obj);
2837 if (obj.M == 0)
2838 {
2839 /* Mark as zero-length by duplicating prev/curr */
2840 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 0] = PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 1] = PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 2] = 0.0;
2841 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 0] = PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 1] = PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 2] = 0.0;
2842 continue;
2843 }
2844 double pprev[3], pcurr[3];
2845 mass_maps_compute_prev_curr_positions(&obj, pprev, pcurr, lpt_order);
2846 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 0] = pprev[0];
2847 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 1] = pprev[1];
2848 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx + 2] = pprev[2];
2849 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 0] = pcurr[0];
2850 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 1] = pcurr[1];
2851 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx + 2] = pcurr[2];
2852 if (collect_disp_stats)
2853 {
2854 /* Displacement relative to Lagrangian position q */
2855 double qx = (ig + SHIFT) * scale_block;
2856 double qy = (jg + SHIFT) * scale_block;
2857 double qz = (kg + SHIFT) * scale_block;
2858 double dx = pcurr[0] - qx;
2859 double dy = pcurr[1] - qy;
2860 double dz = pcurr[2] - qz;
2861 double d = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
2862 blk_total++;
2863 if (d > thresh_block)
2864 blk_exceed++;
2865 if (d > blk_max)
2866 blk_max = d;
2867 }
2868 }
2869 }
2870 }
2871 if (collect_disp_stats)
2872 {
2873#ifdef _OPENMP
2874#pragma omp atomic update
2875#endif
2876 disp_total_local += blk_total;
2877#ifdef _OPENMP
2878#pragma omp atomic update
2879#endif
2880 disp_exceed_local += blk_exceed;
2881#ifdef _OPENMP
2882#pragma omp critical
2883#endif
2884 {
2885 if (blk_max > disp_max_local)
2886 disp_max_local = blk_max;
2887 }
2888 }
2889
2890 /* Use cached positions for each passing replication */
2891 for (int ip = 0; ip < pass_n; ++ip)
2892 {
2893 int ir = rep_pass[ip];
2894 const double *shift = &RepShift[3 * ir];
2895 unsigned long long local_cross = 0ULL;
2896 long idx2 = 0;
2897 for (int ig = ig0; ig <= ig1; ++ig)
2898 {
2899 for (int jg = jg0; jg <= jg1; ++jg)
2900 {
2901 for (int kg = kg0; kg <= kg1; ++kg, ++idx2)
2902 {
2903 double Pprev[3] = {PosPrevBuf[3 * idx2 + 0] + shift[0],
2904 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx2 + 1] + shift[1],
2905 PosPrevBuf[3 * idx2 + 2] + shift[2]};
2906 double Pcurr[3] = {PosCurrBuf[3 * idx2 + 0] + shift[0],
2907 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx2 + 1] + shift[1],
2908 PosCurrBuf[3 * idx2 + 2] + shift[2]};
2909 /* Skip if empty marked */
2910 if (Pprev[0] == 0.0 && Pprev[1] == 0.0 && Pprev[2] == 0.0 &&
2911 Pcurr[0] == 0.0 && Pcurr[1] == 0.0 && Pcurr[2] == 0.0)
2912 continue;
2913 double entry_pos[3];
2914 if (!mass_maps_crossing_from_shifted_positions(Pprev, Pcurr, c_phys, chi_prev_seg, chi_curr_seg, NULL, entry_pos))
2915 continue;
2916 /* Angular aperture: only accumulate entries inside PLC cone */
2917 if (!mass_maps_entry_inside_aperture(entry_pos))
2918 continue;
2919#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
2920 {
2921 /* Filter: include only if ZPLC > ZACC */
2922 double dx = entry_pos[0] - c_phys[0];
2923 double dy = entry_pos[1] - c_phys[1];
2924 double dz = entry_pos[2] - c_phys[2];
2925 double r_entry = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
2926 double z_plc = InverseComovingDistance(r_entry);
2927#ifdef SNAPSHOT
2928 double z_acc = mass_maps_get_zacc_global(ig, jg, kg);
2929#ifdef _OPENMP
2930#pragma omp atomic update
2931#endif
2932 zfilter_considered_local++;
2933 /* Track min/max and consistency for debug */
2934#ifdef _OPENMP
2935#pragma omp critical
2936#endif
2937 {
2938 if (z_plc < zplc_min_local)
2939 zplc_min_local = z_plc;
2940 if (z_plc > zplc_max_local)
2941 zplc_max_local = z_plc;
2942 if (z_acc < zacc_min_local)
2943 zacc_min_local = z_acc;
2944 if (z_acc > zacc_max_local)
2945 zacc_max_local = z_acc;
2946 }
2947 {
2948 /* Check that z_plc lies within this segment bounds (tolerance at edges) */
2949 double zmin_seg = (z_prev < z_curr) ? z_prev : z_curr;
2950 double zmax_seg = (z_prev > z_curr) ? z_prev : z_curr;
2951 double tol = 1e-3;
2952 if (z_plc < zmin_seg - tol || z_plc > zmax_seg + tol)
2953 {
2954#ifdef _OPENMP
2955#pragma omp atomic update
2956#endif
2957 zplc_out_of_segment_local++;
2958 }
2959 }
2960 if (!(z_plc > z_acc))
2961 {
2962#ifdef _OPENMP
2963#pragma omp atomic update
2964#endif
2965 zfilter_excluded_local++;
2966 continue;
2967 }
2968#else
2969#error "MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED requires SNAPSHOT"
2970#endif
2971 }
2972#endif
2973 local_cross++;
2974 if (s_map >= 0 && s_map < NMassSheets && MassMapNSIDE_current > 0)
2975 {
2976 long ipix;
2977 if (mass_maps_compute_pixel_from_pos(entry_pos, MassMapNSIDE_current, &ipix))
2978 {
2979 if ((unsigned long)ipix < (unsigned long)MassMapNPIX)
2980 {
2981 if (LocalMap)
2982 {
2983 LocalMap[ipix] += 1.0;
2984 }
2985 else
2986 {
2987 double *map = mass_maps_segment_ptr(s_map);
2988#ifdef _OPENMP
2989#pragma omp atomic update
2990#endif
2991 map[ipix] += 1.0;
2992 }
2993 }
2994 else
2995 {
2996 ipix_oob_local++;
2997 }
2998 }
2999 }
3000 }
3001 }
3002 }
3003 /* Thread-safe global counters */
3004#ifdef _OPENMP
3005#pragma omp atomic update
3006#endif
3007 total_crossings_all_reps += local_cross;
3008 if (rep_crossings_local)
3009 {
3010#ifdef _OPENMP
3011#pragma omp atomic update
3012#endif
3013 rep_crossings_local[ir] += local_cross;
3014 }
3015 }
3016 }
3017 else
3018 {
3019 /* No cache available: compute per particle per passing replication */
3020 /* Per-block diagnostics */
3021 unsigned long long blk_total = 0ULL, blk_exceed = 0ULL;
3022 double blk_max = 0.0;
3023 for (int ip = 0; ip < pass_n; ++ip)
3024 {
3025 int ir = rep_pass[ip];
3026 const double *shift = &RepShift[3 * ir];
3027 unsigned long long local_cross = 0ULL;
3028 for (int ig = ig0; ig <= ig1; ++ig)
3029 {
3030 for (int jg = jg0; jg <= jg1; ++jg)
3031 {
3032 for (int kg = kg0; kg <= kg1; ++kg)
3033 {
3034 pos_data obj;
3035 mass_maps_set_point_from_products_global(ig, jg, kg, Fseg, &obj);
3036 if (obj.M == 0)
3037 continue;
3038 double pos_prev[3], pos_curr[3];
3039 mass_maps_compute_prev_curr_positions(&obj, pos_prev, pos_curr, lpt_order);
3040 if (collect_disp_stats && ip == 0)
3041 {
3042 double qx = (ig + SHIFT) * scale_block;
3043 double qy = (jg + SHIFT) * scale_block;
3044 double qz = (kg + SHIFT) * scale_block;
3045 double dx = pos_curr[0] - qx;
3046 double dy = pos_curr[1] - qy;
3047 double dz = pos_curr[2] - qz;
3048 double d = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
3049 blk_total++;
3050 if (d > thresh_block)
3051 blk_exceed++;
3052 if (d > blk_max)
3053 blk_max = d;
3054 }
3055 double Pprev[3] = {pos_prev[0] + shift[0], pos_prev[1] + shift[1], pos_prev[2] + shift[2]};
3056 double Pcurr[3] = {pos_curr[0] + shift[0], pos_curr[1] + shift[1], pos_curr[2] + shift[2]};
3057 double entry_pos[3];
3058 if (!mass_maps_crossing_from_shifted_positions(Pprev, Pcurr, c_phys, chi_prev_seg, chi_curr_seg, NULL, entry_pos))
3059 continue;
3060 /* Angular aperture: only accumulate entries inside PLC cone */
3061 if (!mass_maps_entry_inside_aperture(entry_pos))
3062 continue;
3063#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
3064 {
3065 double dx = entry_pos[0] - c_phys[0];
3066 double dy = entry_pos[1] - c_phys[1];
3067 double dz = entry_pos[2] - c_phys[2];
3068 double r_entry = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
3069 double z_plc = InverseComovingDistance(r_entry);
3070#ifdef SNAPSHOT
3071 double z_acc = mass_maps_get_zacc_global(ig, jg, kg);
3072#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
3073 int gid = mass_maps_get_group_id_global(ig, jg, kg);
3074 if (gid > 0 && mass_maps_group_in_plc_by_id(gid))
3075 {
3076 cons_with_plcgroup_local++;
3077 }
3078#endif
3079#ifdef _OPENMP
3080#pragma omp atomic update
3081#endif
3082 zfilter_considered_local++;
3083 /* Track min/max and consistency for debug */
3084#ifdef _OPENMP
3085#pragma omp critical
3086#endif
3087 {
3088 if (z_plc < zplc_min_local)
3089 zplc_min_local = z_plc;
3090 if (z_plc > zplc_max_local)
3091 zplc_max_local = z_plc;
3092 if (z_acc < zacc_min_local)
3093 zacc_min_local = z_acc;
3094 if (z_acc > zacc_max_local)
3095 zacc_max_local = z_acc;
3096 }
3097 {
3098 /* Check that z_plc lies within this segment bounds (tolerance at edges) */
3099 double zmin_seg = (z_prev < z_curr) ? z_prev : z_curr;
3100 double zmax_seg = (z_prev > z_curr) ? z_prev : z_curr;
3101 double tol = 1e-3;
3102 if (z_plc < zmin_seg - tol || z_plc > zmax_seg + tol)
3103 {
3104#ifdef _OPENMP
3105#pragma omp atomic update
3106#endif
3107 zplc_out_of_segment_local++;
3108 }
3109 }
3110 if (!(z_plc > z_acc))
3111 {
3112#ifdef _OPENMP
3113#pragma omp atomic update
3114#endif
3115 zfilter_excluded_local++;
3116#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
3117 if (gid > 0)
3118 {
3119 excl_with_group_local++;
3120 if (mass_maps_group_in_plc_by_id(gid))
3121 excl_with_plcgroup_local++;
3122 }
3123#endif
3124 continue;
3125 }
3126#else
3127#error "MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED requires SNAPSHOT"
3128#endif
3129 }
3130#endif
3131 local_cross++;
3132 if (s_map >= 0 && s_map < NMassSheets && MassMapNSIDE_current > 0)
3133 {
3134 long ipix;
3135 if (mass_maps_compute_pixel_from_pos(entry_pos, MassMapNSIDE_current, &ipix))
3136 {
3137 if ((unsigned long)ipix < (unsigned long)MassMapNPIX)
3138 {
3139 double *map = mass_maps_segment_ptr(s_map);
3140#ifdef _OPENMP
3141#pragma omp atomic update
3142#endif
3143 map[ipix] += 1.0;
3144 }
3145 else
3146 {
3147 ipix_oob_local++;
3148 }
3149 }
3150 }
3151 }
3152 }
3153 }
3154 /* Thread-safe global counters */
3155#ifdef _OPENMP
3156#pragma omp atomic update
3157#endif
3158 total_crossings_all_reps += local_cross;
3159 if (rep_crossings_local)
3160 {
3161#ifdef _OPENMP
3162#pragma omp atomic update
3163#endif
3164 rep_crossings_local[ir] += local_cross;
3165 }
3166 }
3167 if (collect_disp_stats)
3168 {
3169#ifdef _OPENMP
3170#pragma omp atomic update
3171#endif
3172 disp_total_local += blk_total;
3173#ifdef _OPENMP
3174#pragma omp atomic update
3175#endif
3176 disp_exceed_local += blk_exceed;
3177#ifdef _OPENMP
3178#pragma omp critical
3179#endif
3180 {
3181 if (blk_max > disp_max_local)
3182 disp_max_local = blk_max;
3183 }
3184 }
3185 }
3186 /* If we used a local map, merge it into the global segment map once per block */
3187 if (LocalMap)
3188 {
3189 double *map = mass_maps_segment_ptr(s_map);
3190 if (map)
3191 {
3192 for (long i = 0; i < MassMapNPIX; ++i)
3193 {
3194 double v = LocalMap[i];
3195 if (v == 0.0)
3196 continue;
3197#ifdef _OPENMP
3198#pragma omp atomic update
3199#endif
3200 map[i] += v;
3201 }
3202 }
3203 }
3204 if (ipix_oob_local > 0ULL && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
3205 {
3206 /* Per-block debug: report any out-of-cap pixel indices (should be zero) */
3207 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS WARN: block (%d,%d,%d) ipix>=Ncap occurrences: %llu\n", fdate(), bx_i, by, bz, ipix_oob_local);
3208 }
3209 if (PosPrevBuf)
3210 free(PosPrevBuf);
3211 if (PosCurrBuf)
3212 free(PosCurrBuf);
3213 if (LocalMap)
3214 free(LocalMap);
3215 }
3216
3217 /* Print diagnostics on block visitation */
3218 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
3219 {
3220 double init_pct = (blocks_total > 0) ? (100.0 * (double)blocks_init_count / (double)blocks_total) : 0.0;
3221 double visit_pct = (blocks_total > 0) ? (100.0 * (double)blocks_visited / (double)blocks_total) : 0.0;
3222 double skip_pct = (blocks_total > 0) ? (100.0 * (double)blocks_skipped_shell / (double)blocks_total) : 0.0;
3223 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS culling: blocks total=%lld init=%lld (%.1f%%) visited=%lld (%.1f%%) skipped_by_shell=%lld (%.1f%%)\n",
3224 fdate(), blocks_total, blocks_init_count, init_pct, blocks_visited, visit_pct, blocks_skipped_shell, skip_pct);
3225 }
3226 }
3227 else
3228 {
3229 /* Previous per-rep traversal (fallback without culling or on allocation failure) */
3230 for (int ir = 0; ir < MassMapSegmentReplicationCount; ++ir)
3231 {
3232 int rep_id = MassMapSegmentReplications[ir];
3233 unsigned long long rep_crossings = 0ULL;
3234 double shift[3] = {RepShift ? RepShift[3 * ir + 0] : 0.0,
3235 RepShift ? RepShift[3 * ir + 1] : 0.0,
3236 RepShift ? RepShift[3 * ir + 2] : 0.0};
3237 unsigned long long local_total = 0ULL, local_exceed = 0ULL;
3238 double local_max = 0.0;
3239 /* Buffer for fallback path: treat the whole local tile as one block (variable pad only) */
3240 double thresh_fallback = aabb_pad_phys;
3241#ifdef _OPENMP
3242#pragma omp parallel for collapse(3) schedule(static) reduction(+ : rep_crossings, local_total, local_exceed) reduction(max : local_max)
3243#endif
3244 for (int ig = gx_start; ig < gx_start + nx_local; ++ig)
3245 {
3246 for (int jg = gy_start; jg < gy_start + ny_local; ++jg)
3247 {
3248 for (int kg = gz_start; kg < gz_start + nz_local; ++kg)
3249 {
3250 pos_data obj;
3251 mass_maps_set_point_from_products_global(ig, jg, kg, Fseg, &obj);
3252 if (obj.M == 0)
3253 continue; /* safety */
3254 double pos_prev[3], pos_curr[3];
3255 mass_maps_compute_prev_curr_positions(&obj, pos_prev, pos_curr, lpt_order);
3256 if (collect_disp_stats && ir == 0)
3257 {
3258 double qx = (ig + SHIFT) * params.InterPartDist;
3259 double qy = (jg + SHIFT) * params.InterPartDist;
3260 double qz = (kg + SHIFT) * params.InterPartDist;
3261 double dx = pos_curr[0] - qx;
3262 double dy = pos_curr[1] - qy;
3263 double dz = pos_curr[2] - qz;
3264 double d = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
3265 local_total++;
3266 if (d > thresh_fallback)
3267 local_exceed++;
3268 if (d > local_max)
3269 local_max = d;
3270 }
3271 double Pprev[3] = {pos_prev[0] + shift[0], pos_prev[1] + shift[1], pos_prev[2] + shift[2]};
3272 double Pcurr[3] = {pos_curr[0] + shift[0], pos_curr[1] + shift[1], pos_curr[2] + shift[2]};
3273 double entry_pos[3];
3274 if (!mass_maps_crossing_from_shifted_positions(Pprev, Pcurr, c_phys, chi_prev_seg, chi_curr_seg, NULL, entry_pos))
3275 continue;
3276 if (!mass_maps_entry_inside_aperture(entry_pos))
3277 continue;
3278#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
3279 {
3280 double dx = entry_pos[0] - c_phys[0];
3281 double dy = entry_pos[1] - c_phys[1];
3282 double dz = entry_pos[2] - c_phys[2];
3283 double r_entry = sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy + dz * dz);
3284 double z_plc = InverseComovingDistance(r_entry);
3285#ifdef SNAPSHOT
3286 double z_acc = mass_maps_get_zacc_global(ig, jg, kg);
3287#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
3288 int gid = mass_maps_get_group_id_global(ig, jg, kg);
3289 if (gid > 0 && mass_maps_group_in_plc_by_id(gid))
3290 {
3291 /* Count considered entries whose group is present in PLC */
3292#ifdef _OPENMP
3293#pragma omp atomic update
3294#endif
3295 cons_with_plcgroup_local++;
3296 }
3297#endif
3298#ifdef _OPENMP
3299#pragma omp atomic update
3300#endif
3301 zfilter_considered_local++;
3302 /* Track min/max and consistency for debug */
3303#ifdef _OPENMP
3304#pragma omp critical
3305#endif
3306 {
3307 if (z_plc < zplc_min_local)
3308 zplc_min_local = z_plc;
3309 if (z_plc > zplc_max_local)
3310 zplc_max_local = z_plc;
3311 if (z_acc < zacc_min_local)
3312 zacc_min_local = z_acc;
3313 if (z_acc > zacc_max_local)
3314 zacc_max_local = z_acc;
3315 }
3316 {
3317 /* Check that z_plc lies within this segment bounds (tolerance at edges) */
3318 double zmin_seg = (z_prev < z_curr) ? z_prev : z_curr;
3319 double zmax_seg = (z_prev > z_curr) ? z_prev : z_curr;
3320 double tol = 1e-3;
3321 if (z_plc < zmin_seg - tol || z_plc > zmax_seg + tol)
3322 {
3323#ifdef _OPENMP
3324#pragma omp atomic update
3325#endif
3326 zplc_out_of_segment_local++;
3327 }
3328 }
3329 if (!(z_plc > z_acc))
3330 {
3331#ifdef _OPENMP
3332#pragma omp atomic update
3333#endif
3334 zfilter_excluded_local++;
3335#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
3336 if (gid > 0)
3337 {
3338#ifdef _OPENMP
3339#pragma omp atomic update
3340#endif
3341 excl_with_group_local++;
3342 if (mass_maps_group_in_plc_by_id(gid))
3343 {
3344#ifdef _OPENMP
3345#pragma omp atomic update
3346#endif
3347 excl_with_plcgroup_local++;
3348 }
3349 }
3350#endif
3351 continue;
3352 }
3353#else
3354#error "MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED requires SNAPSHOT"
3355#endif
3356 }
3357#endif
3358 ++rep_crossings;
3359 int s_map = segment_index - 1;
3360 if (s_map >= 0 && s_map < NMassSheets && MassMapNSIDE_current > 0)
3361 {
3362 long ipix;
3363 if (mass_maps_compute_pixel_from_pos(entry_pos, MassMapNSIDE_current, &ipix))
3364 {
3365 if ((unsigned long)ipix >= (unsigned long)MassMapNPIX)
3366 continue; /* guard */
3367 double *map = mass_maps_segment_ptr(s_map);
3368#ifdef _OPENMP
3369#pragma omp atomic update
3370#endif
3371 map[ipix] += 1.0;
3372 }
3373 }
3374 }
3375 }
3376 }
3377 total_crossings_all_reps += rep_crossings;
3378 if (rep_crossings_local)
3379 rep_crossings_local[ir] = rep_crossings;
3380 if (collect_disp_stats && ir == 0)
3381 {
3382 disp_total_local += local_total;
3383 disp_exceed_local += local_exceed;
3384 if (local_max > disp_max_local)
3385 disp_max_local = local_max;
3386 }
3387 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
3388 {
3389 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(products): segment %d rep %d local entries %llu\n", fdate(), segment_index, rep_id, rep_crossings);
3390 }
3391 }
3392 }
3393
3394 if (RepShift)
3395 free(RepShift);
3396 /* Free culling structures */
3397 if (edge_x)
3398 free(edge_x);
3399 if (edge_y)
3400 free(edge_y);
3401 if (edge_z)
3402 free(edge_z);
3403
3404 /* Reduce per-rep and total counts across tasks */
3405 if (MassMapSegmentReplicationCount > 0)
3406 {
3407 /* Per-rep reductions (only if allocations succeeded) */
3408 if (rep_crossings_local)
3409 {
3410 MPI_Reduce(rep_crossings_local, rep_crossings_global,
3411 MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3412 }
3413 /* Total across reps */
3414 unsigned long long local_total = total_crossings_all_reps;
3415 MPI_Reduce(&local_total, &total_crossings_all_reps_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3416 }
3417
3418 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
3419 {
3420 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(products): segment %d total local entries across %d reps: %llu\n",
3421 fdate(), segment_index, MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, total_crossings_all_reps);
3422 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(products): segment %d total global entries across %d reps: %llu\n",
3423 fdate(), segment_index, MassMapSegmentReplicationCount, total_crossings_all_reps_global);
3424 }
3425
3426#ifdef MASS_MAPS_FILTER_UNCOLLAPSED
3427 /* Reduce and report ZPLC>ZACC filter diagnostics */
3428 MPI_Reduce(&zfilter_considered_local, &zfilter_considered_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3429 MPI_Reduce(&zfilter_excluded_local, &zfilter_excluded_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3430 /* Reduce extra diagnostics */
3431 MPI_Reduce(&zplc_min_local, &zplc_min_global, 1, MPI_DOUBLE, MPI_MIN, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3432 MPI_Reduce(&zplc_max_local, &zplc_max_global, 1, MPI_DOUBLE, MPI_MAX, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3433 MPI_Reduce(&zacc_min_local, &zacc_min_global, 1, MPI_DOUBLE, MPI_MIN, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3434 MPI_Reduce(&zacc_max_local, &zacc_max_global, 1, MPI_DOUBLE, MPI_MAX, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3435 MPI_Reduce(&zplc_out_of_segment_local, &zplc_out_of_segment_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3436#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
3437 MPI_Reduce(&excl_with_group_local, &excl_with_group_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3438 MPI_Reduce(&excl_with_plcgroup_local, &excl_with_plcgroup_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3439 MPI_Reduce(&cons_with_plcgroup_local, &cons_with_plcgroup_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3440#endif
3441 if (!ThisTask && internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)
3442 {
3443 unsigned long long zf_included = (zfilter_considered_global >= zfilter_excluded_global)
3444 ? (zfilter_considered_global - zfilter_excluded_global)
3445 : 0ULL;
3446 double frac_excl = (zfilter_considered_global > 0ULL)
3447 ? ((double)zfilter_excluded_global / (double)zfilter_considered_global)
3448 : 0.0;
3449 /* Stash diagnostics for FITS header metadata */
3450 g_massmaps_filter_diag.considered = (long long)zfilter_considered_global;
3451 g_massmaps_filter_diag.excluded = (long long)zfilter_excluded_global;
3452 g_massmaps_filter_diag.included = (long long)zf_included;
3453 g_massmaps_filter_diag.frac_excluded = frac_excl;
3454 g_massmaps_filter_diag.zplc_min = zplc_min_global;
3455 g_massmaps_filter_diag.zplc_max = zplc_max_global;
3456 g_massmaps_filter_diag.zacc_min = zacc_min_global;
3457 g_massmaps_filter_diag.zacc_max = zacc_max_global;
3458 g_massmaps_filter_diag.zplc_out_of_segment = (long long)zplc_out_of_segment_global;
3459 g_massmaps_filter_diag.segment_index = segment_index - 1; /* map index s_map below */
3460 g_massmaps_filter_diag.present = 1;
3461 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(filter): segment %d considered=%llu excluded=%llu (%.2f%%) included=%llu (%.2f%%)\n",
3462 fdate(), segment_index,
3463 zfilter_considered_global,
3464 zfilter_excluded_global, 100.0 * frac_excl,
3465 zf_included, 100.0 * (1.0 - frac_excl));
3466 if (internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
3467 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(filter-diag): seg %d z_plc[min,max]=[%.6g, %.6g] z_acc[min,max]=[%.6g, %.6g] z_plc_out_of_seg=%llu\n",
3468 fdate(), segment_index,
3469 zplc_min_global, zplc_max_global,
3470 zacc_min_global, zacc_max_global,
3471 zplc_out_of_segment_global);
3472#ifdef MASS_MAPS_MATCH_DIAG
3473 if (internal.verbose_level >= VDBG && zfilter_considered_global > 0ULL)
3474 {
3475 double frac_cons_plc = (double)cons_with_plcgroup_global / (double)zfilter_considered_global;
3476 double frac_excl_grp = (double)excl_with_group_global / (double)zfilter_excluded_global;
3477 double frac_excl_plc = (double)excl_with_plcgroup_global / (double)zfilter_excluded_global;
3478 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(match): seg %d considered_with_plcgroup=%llu (%.2f%% of considered) excluded_with_group=%llu (%.2f%% of excluded) excluded_with_plcgroup=%llu (%.2f%% of excluded)\n",
3479 fdate(), segment_index,
3480 cons_with_plcgroup_global, 100.0 * frac_cons_plc,
3481 excl_with_group_global, 100.0 * frac_excl_grp,
3482 excl_with_plcgroup_global, 100.0 * frac_excl_plc);
3483 }
3484#endif
3485 }
3486#endif
3487
3488 /* Report last-segment displacement vs buffer stats */
3489 if (collect_disp_stats)
3490 {
3491 unsigned long long disp_total_global = 0ULL, disp_exceed_global = 0ULL;
3492 double disp_max_global = 0.0;
3493 MPI_Reduce(&disp_total_local, &disp_total_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3494 MPI_Reduce(&disp_exceed_local, &disp_exceed_global, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3495 MPI_Reduce(&disp_max_local, &disp_max_global, 1, MPI_DOUBLE, MPI_MAX, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3496 if (!ThisTask)
3497 {
3498 double frac = (disp_total_global > 0ULL) ? ((double)disp_exceed_global / (double)disp_total_global) : 0.0;
3499 if (internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
3500 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS buffer-diag: last segment |x(q,z)-q| vs buffer pad=%.6g Mpc (%.6g cells): total=%llu exceed=%llu (%.3f%%) max=%.6g\n",
3501 fdate(), aabb_pad_phys, (aabb_pad_phys / params.InterPartDist),
3502 disp_total_global, disp_exceed_global, 100.0 * frac, disp_max_global);
3503 if (disp_total_global > 0ULL && frac >= warn_frac)
3504 {
3505 fprintf(stderr,
3506 "[%s] MASS_MAPS WARNING: %.2f%% of particles exceeded the buffer pad=%.6g Mpc (%.6g cells). Consider increasing MASS_MAPS_VARPAD_FACTOR (warn threshold=%.2f%%).\n",
3507 fdate(), 100.0 * frac, aabb_pad_phys, (aabb_pad_phys / params.InterPartDist), 100.0 * warn_frac);
3508 }
3509 }
3510 }
3511
3512 /* Reduce the segment map to root (task 0) */
3513 if (MassMapNSIDE_current > 0)
3514 {
3515 int s_map = segment_index - 1;
3516 if (s_map >= 0 && s_map < NMassSheets)
3517 {
3518 double *map_local = mass_maps_segment_ptr(s_map);
3519 if (!ThisTask)
3520 {
3521 if (!MassMapReduceBuffer)
3522 MassMapReduceBuffer = (double *)malloc(sizeof(double) * (size_t)MassMapNPIX);
3523 }
3524 MPI_Reduce(map_local,
3525 (!ThisTask ? MassMapReduceBuffer : NULL),
3526 (int)MassMapNPIX,
3527 MPI_DOUBLE,
3528 MPI_SUM,
3529 0,
3530 MPI_COMM_WORLD);
3531 if (!ThisTask && MassMapReduceBuffer)
3532 {
3533 /* Copy reduced result back into the segment map on root */
3534 memcpy(map_local, MassMapReduceBuffer, sizeof(double) * (size_t)MassMapNPIX);
3535 /* Write to FITS */
3536 mass_maps_write_segment_map(s_map);
3537 /* Clear saved filter diagnostics once written for this segment */
3538 g_massmaps_filter_diag.present = 0;
3539 if (internal.verbose_level >= VDBG)
3540 {
3541 double sum, vmin, vmax;
3542 long nnz;
3543 mass_maps_map_stats(map_local, MassMapNPIX, &sum, &vmin, &vmax, &nnz);
3544 long axis_pix = mass_maps_axis_pixel_ring(MassMapNSIDE_current);
3545 double axis_val = (axis_pix >= 0 && axis_pix < MassMapNPIX) ? map_local[axis_pix] : -1.0;
3546 printf("[%s] MASS_MAPS(diag): seg %d map stats: sum=%.0f nnz=%ld min=%.0f max=%.0f axis_pix=%ld axis_val=%.0f\n",
3547 fdate(), s_map, sum, nnz, vmin, vmax, axis_pix, axis_val);
3548 }
3549 }
3550 }
3551 }
3552
3553 if (rep_crossings_local)
3554 free(rep_crossings_local);
3555 if (rep_crossings_global)
3556 free(rep_crossings_global);
3557 return; /* products path handled this segment */
3558}

◆ mass_maps_write_sheet_table()

int mass_maps_write_sheet_table ( void  )

mass_maps_write_sheet_table

Purpose Rank 0 only: write an ASCII table describing each mass sheet (segment) to pinocchio.<RunFlag>.sheets.out for reproducibility and external analysis.

Format

  • Plain text, whitespace-separated values.
  • Comment lines start with '#', including a column legend.
  • File is overwritten if it already exists.

Columns and units 1) id Integer segment id (0..NMassSheets-1) 2) z_hi Upper redshift bound (dimensionless) 3) z_lo Lower redshift bound (dimensionless), z_hi > z_lo 4) delta_z z_hi - z_lo 5) chi_hi Upper comoving distance (Mpc) 6) chi_lo Lower comoving distance (Mpc) 7) delta_chi chi_hi - chi_lo (Mpc) 8) inv_delta_chi 1 / (chi_hi - chi_lo) (1/Mpc) 9) da_hi Angular diameter distance at z_hi (Mpc) 10) da_lo Angular diameter distance at z_lo (Mpc) 11) chi3_diff chi_hi^3 - chi_lo^3 (Mpc^3)

Returns 0 on success (including the no-op case when there is nothing to write), 1 on I/O error opening or writing the file.

Notes

  • Only task 0 writes this file; other ranks return 0 immediately.
  • No MPI synchronization is performed here. The table reflects the current in-memory MassSheets array.

Definition at line 1797 of file write_mass_maps.c.

1798{
1799 if (ThisTask != 0)
1800 return 0;

1802 return 0;

1806 FILE *fd = fopen(fname, "w");
1807 if (!fd)
1808 {
1809 fprintf(stderr, "Task 0 ERROR: cannot open %s for writing.\n", fname);
1810 return 1;
1811 }
1812 fprintf(fd, "# Mass sheet definitions\n");
1813 fprintf(fd, "# Columns:\n");

1815 "id", "z_hi", "z_lo", "delta_z", "chi_hi", "chi_lo", "delta_chi", "inv_delta_chi", "da_hi", "da_lo", "chi3_diff");

1820 s, ms->z_hi, ms->z_lo, ms->delta_z, ms->chi_hi, ms->chi_lo, ms->delta_chi, ms->inv_dchi, ms->da_hi, ms->da_lo, ms->chi3_diff);
1821 }
1822 fclose(fd);
1823 if (internal.verbose_level >= VDIAG)

1825 return 0;

40 /* here it computes the size of required memory

43 ZELDOVICH DISPLACEMENTS:
44
45 name sizeof N
46
47 products 4 float + 1 int = 20 MyGrids[0].total_local_size
48 kdensity 1 double = 8 MyGrids[*].total_local_size_fft
49 second_derivatives 6 double = 48 MyGrids[*].total_local_size
50
51 first_derivatives and density will share the same memory as second_derivatives
52
53 these will be allocated by pfft routines:
54
55 cvector_fft 1 double = 8 MyGrids[*].total_local_size_fft
56 rvector_fft 1 double = 8 MyGrids[*].total_local_size_fft
57
58 This is needed by GenIC:
59 seedtable 1 int = 4 MyGrids[*].GSglobal[_x_] * MyGrids[*].GSglobal[_y_]
60
61 Total for ZEL: 76 + 16 = 92 + overhead for fragmentation + smaller things (seedtable etc)
62
63 2LPT/3LPT DISPLACEMENTS
64
65 name sizeof N
66
67 products (2LPT): 7 float + 1 int = 32 MyGrids[0].total_local_size
68 products (3LPT) 13 float + 1 int = 56 MyGrids[0].total_local_size
69 kdensity 1 double = 8 MyGrids[*].total_local_size_fft
70 second_derivatives 6 double = 48 MyGrids[*].total_local_size
71 kvector_2LPT 1 double = 8 MyGrids[0].total_local_size_fft
72 kvector_3LPT_1 1 double = 8 MyGrids[0].total_local_size_fft
73 kvector_3LPT_2 1 double = 8 MyGrids[0].total_local_size_fft
74
75 first_derivatives and density will share the same memory as second_derivatives
76 source_?LPT* will share the same memory as kvector_?LPT*
77
78 This is needed by GenIC:
79 seedtable 1 int = 4 MyGrids[*].GSglobal[_x_] * MyGrids[*].GSglobal[_y_]
80
81 These will be allocated by pfft routines:
82
83 cvector_fft 1 double = 8 MyGrids[*].total_local_size_fft
84 rvector_fft 1 double = 8 MyGrids[*].total_local_size_fft
85
86 Total for 2LPT: 32 + 80 + 16 = 128 + overhead for fragmentation + smaller things
87 Total for 3LPT: 56 + 80 + 16 = 152 + overhead for fragmentation + smaller things
88
89 Timeless snapshot adds 4 bytes to the count.
90
91 In case or recomputation of displacements:
92
93 products (ZEL): 7 float + 1 int = 32 MyGrids[0].total_local_size
94 products (2LPT): 13 float + 1 int = 56 MyGrids[0].total_local_size
95 products (3LPT): 25 float + 1 int = 104 MyGrids[0].total_local_size
96 Total for ZEL: 32 + 80 + 16 = 128 + overhead for fragmentation
97 Total for 2LPT: 56 + 80 + 16 = 152 + overhead for fragmentation
98 Total for 3LPT: 104 + 80 + 16 = 200 + overhead for fragmentation
99
100 Products for fragmentation will require the same memory as those for fmax
101 plus the overhead for boundary layers.
102
103 Group catalogs will require less memory than the fmax products. This will be
104 checked with an estimate of the number of halos.
105
106 memory.prods: fmax products in fft space
107 memory.fields_to_keep LPT sources in kspace
108 memory.fields second_derivatives, // seedtable
109 memory.first_allocated: the three above
110 memory.fft: needed by pfft vectors
111 memory.fmax_total: needed by fmax, the sum of fft and first_allocated
112 memory.frag_prods: fmax products in subbox space
113 memory.frag_arrays: linking list and group ID
114 memory.groups: groups catalog, including histories, map and PLC
115 memory.frag_allocated: needed by fragment, allocated
116 memory.frag_total: needed by fragment, including FFTs
117 memory.all_allocated: total allocated memory (not including FFTs)
118 memory.all: total memory needed (including FFTs)
119
120 */
121
122 int igrid;
123 unsigned int myNalloc, Nalloc;
124
125 /***********************************************/
126 /* COLLAPSE TIMES PART */
127 /* this is the memory needed to store products */
128 memory.prods = MyGrids[0].total_local_size * sizeof(product_data); /* products */
129 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.prods);
130 memory.fields = memory.fields_to_keep = 0;
131
132 /* these fields are needed after products if displacements are recomputed */
133 for (igrid = 0; igrid < Ngrids; igrid++)
134 {
135 memory.fields_to_keep += MyGrids[igrid].total_local_size_fft * sizeof(double); /* kdensity */
136 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.fields_to_keep);
137 }
138#ifdef TWO_LPT
139 memory.fields_to_keep += MyGrids[0].total_local_size_fft * sizeof(double); /* kvector_2LPT */
140 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.fields_to_keep);
141#ifdef THREE_LPT
142 memory.fields_to_keep += MyGrids[0].total_local_size_fft * sizeof(double); /* kvector_3LPT_1 */
143 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.fields_to_keep);
144 memory.fields_to_keep += MyGrids[0].total_local_size_fft * sizeof(double); /* kvector_3LPT_2 */
145 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.fields_to_keep);
146#endif
147#endif
148
149 /* these fields are needed only by Fmax */
150 for (igrid = 0; igrid < Ngrids; igrid++)
151 for (int dim = 0; dim < 6; dim++)
152 {
153 memory.fields += MyGrids[igrid].total_local_size * sizeof(double); /* second_derivatives */
154 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.fields);
155 }
156
157 /* for (igrid=0; igrid<Ngrids; igrid++) */
158 /* memory.fields += MyGrids[igrid].GSglobal[_x_] * MyGrids[igrid].GSglobal[_y_] * sizeof(unsigned int); /\* seedtable *\/ */
159
160 /* memory allocated by PFFT */
161 for (igrid = 0, memory.fft = 0; igrid < Ngrids; igrid++)
162 {
163 memory.fft += MyGrids[igrid].total_local_size_fft * sizeof(double);
164 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.fft);
165 memory.fft += MyGrids[igrid].total_local_size_fft * sizeof(double);
166 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.fft);
167 }
168
169 memory.first_allocated = memory.prods + memory.fields_to_keep + memory.fields;
170 memory.fmax_total = memory.first_allocated + memory.fft;
171
172 /********************************************************************************/
173 /* FRAGMENTATION PART */
174 /* this is the memory needed to fragment the collapsed medium, including PLC data
175 and the map for needed particles on the boundary */
176 memory.groups = subbox.PredNpeaks * sizeof(group_data);
177 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.groups);
178 memory.groups += subbox.PredNpeaks * +sizeof(histories_data);
179 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.groups);
180#ifdef PLC
181 memory.groups += plc.Nmax * sizeof(plcgroup_data);
182 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.groups);
183#endif
184 memory.groups += subbox.maplength * sizeof(unsigned int);
185 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.groups);
186 memory.groups += subbox.maplength * sizeof(unsigned int);
187 ALIGN_MEMORY_BLOCK(memory.groups);
188
189 /* Here it computes the number of particles it can allocate for the subbox */
190 size_t other_mem = memory.prods + memory.groups
191#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
192 + memory.fields_to_keep + memory.fft
193#endif
194 ;
195
196 if (other_mem > MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask * params.MaxMemPerParticle)
197 myNalloc = 0;
198 else
199 /* -10 is to compensate for remainder in integer division */
200 myNalloc = (MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask * params.MaxMemPerParticle - other_mem) / (sizeof(product_data) + FRAGFIELDS * sizeof(int)) - 10;
201
202 /* Nalloc will be the smallest among all tasks */
203 MPI_Reduce(&myNalloc, &Nalloc, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED, MPI_MIN, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
204 MPI_Bcast(&Nalloc, 1, MPI_UNSIGNED, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
205
206 memory.frag_prods = Nalloc * sizeof(product_data);
207 memory.frag_arrays = Nalloc * FRAGFIELDS * sizeof(int);
208 /* this is the memory occupied by fragmentation */
209 memory.frag_allocated = memory.prods + memory.frag_prods + memory.groups + memory.frag_arrays
210#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
211 + memory.fields_to_keep
212#endif
213 ;
214 memory.frag_total = memory.frag_allocated
215#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
216 + memory.fft
217#endif
218 ;
219
220#ifdef CLASSIC_FRAGMENTATION
221 if (myNalloc < subbox.Npart)
222 {
223 printf("ERROR: Task %d can allocate only %d subbox particles, while %d are needed;\n",
224 ThisTask, myNalloc, subbox.Npart);
225 printf(" a large overhead is probably needed, please increase MaxMemPerParticle\n");
226 return (size_t)0;
227 }
228#endif
229
230 /* this is the largest amount of memory needed by the code */
231 memory.all_allocated = (memory.first_allocated > memory.frag_allocated ? memory.first_allocated : memory.frag_allocated);
232 memory.all = (memory.fmax_total > memory.frag_total ? memory.fmax_total : memory.frag_total);
233
234 double myfraction = (double)Nalloc / (double)subbox.Ngood;
235 double minfraction;
236 MPI_Reduce(&myfraction, &minfraction, 1, MPI_DOUBLE, MPI_MIN, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
237
238 if (!ThisTask)
239 {
240 if (minfraction < 0.5)
241 {
242 printf("ERROR: for some tasks the number of allocatable particles is only a factor %8f\n", minfraction);
243 printf(" times the number of good particles in the subbox; this is far too small!\n");
244 printf(" Please increase MaxMemPerParticle\n");
245 fflush(stdout);
246 return (size_t)0;
247 }
248 }
249
250 return Nalloc;
251}

959{
960 /* input: k (1/Mpc) */
961 /* output: P(k) (Mpc^3) */
962
963 double power, alpha, Tf;
964
965 switch (WhichSpectrum)
966 {
967 case 1:
968 power = PowerSpec_EH(k);
969 break;
970
971 case 2:
972 power = PowerSpec_Tabulated(k);
973 break;
974
975 case 3:
976 power = PowerSpec_Efstathiou(k);
977 break;
978
979 case 4:
980 power = PowerSpec_PowerLaw(k);
981 break;
982
983 case 5:
984 power = PowerSpec_Tabulated(k);
985 break;
986
987 default:
988 power = 0.0;
989 break;
990 }
991
992 if (params.WDM_PartMass_in_kev > 0.)
993 {
994#ifdef BODE_ET_AL_A9
995 /* Eqn. (A9) in Bode, Ostriker & Turok (2001), assuming gX=1.5 */
996 /* NB: this is a length in Mpc/h*/
997 alpha =
998 0.048 * pow((params.Omega0 - params.OmegaBaryon) / 0.4, 0.15) * pow(params.Hubble100 / 0.65, 1.3) * pow(1.0 / params.WDM_PartMass_in_kev, 1.15);
999 Tf = pow(1 + pow(alpha * k / params.Hubble100 * (3.085678e24 / UnitLength_in_cm), 2 * 1.2), -5.0 / 1.2);
1000#else
1001 /* Eqn. just after (A7) in Bode, Ostriker & Turok (2001), assuming gX=1.5 */
1002 /* NB: this is a length in Mpc/h*/
1003 alpha =
1004 0.05 * pow((params.Omega0 - params.OmegaBaryon) / 0.4, 0.15) * pow(params.Hubble100 / 0.65, 1.3) * pow(1.0 / params.WDM_PartMass_in_kev, 1.15);
1005
1006 Tf = pow(1 + pow(alpha * k / params.Hubble100 * (3.085678e24 / UnitLength_in_cm), 2), -5.0);
1007#endif
1008 power *= Tf * Tf;
1009 }
1010
1011 return PkNorm * power;
1012}

1521{
1522 /* it moves an object from the Lagrangian to the Eulerian space,
1523 in sub-box coordinates */
1524
1525 PRODFLOAT pos;
1526
1527 if (!ScaleDep.myseg)
1528 {
1529 /* if the redshift falls before the end of the first segment
1530 (including the case when fragmentation is not segmented)
1531 then there is no need to interpolate */
1532 pos = myobj->q[i] + myobj->w * myobj->v[i];
1533#ifdef TWO_LPT
1534 if (order > 1)
1535 pos += myobj->w2 * myobj->v2[i];
1536#ifdef THREE_LPT
1537 if (order > 2)
1538 pos += myobj->w31 * myobj->v31[i] + myobj->w32 * myobj->v32[i];
1539#endif
1540#endif
1541 }
1542#ifdef RECOMPUTE_DISPLACEMENTS
1543 else
1544 {
1545 /* else interpolate the velocities among two segments */
1546 pos = myobj->q[i] + (1. - myobj->w) * myobj->v_prev[i] + myobj->w * myobj->v[i];
1547#ifdef TWO_LPT
1548 if (order > 1)
1549 pos += (1. - myobj->w2) * myobj->v2_prev[i] + myobj->w2 * myobj->v2[i];
1550#ifdef THREE_LPT

1553#endif
1554#endif
1555 }
1556#endif
1557
1558 if (pbc)
1559 {
1560 /* impose periodic boundary conditions if required */
1561 if (pos >= Box)
1562 pos -= Box;
1563 if (pos < 0.0)
1564 pos += Box;
1565 }
1566
1567 return pos;

1839{
1840 /* limited and quick version of build_groups:
1841 no PLC, no counters, no outputs */
1842 int merge[NV][NV], neigh[NV], fil_list[NV][4];
1843 int nn, ifil, neigrp, pos;
1844 int iz, i1, j1, k1, skip;

1847 double ratio, best_ratio, d2, r2;
1848 int merge_flag;
1849 int ibox, jbox, kbox;
1850
1851 /* Initializations */
1852
1853 ngroups = FILAMENT; // number of groups + filaments
1854 groups[FILAMENT].point = groups[FILAMENT].bottom = subbox.Nstored; // filaments are not grouped!
1855 for (i1 = 0; i1 < FILAMENT; i1++) // this is probably unnecessary, but better add it
1856 {
1857 groups[i1].point = -1;
1858 groups[i1].good = 0;
1859 }
1860
1861 if (!ThisTask)
1862 printf("[%s] Starting the quick fragmentation process\n", fdate());
1863
1864 /* Calculates the number of steps required */
1865
1866 nstep = subbox.Nstored;
1867 nstep_p = nstep / 5;
1868
1869 /************************************************************************
1870 START OF THE CYCLE ON POINTS
1871 ************************************************************************/
1872 for (iz = 0; iz < nstep; iz++)
1873 {
1874 /* More initializations */
1875
1876 neigrp = 0; // number of neighbouring groups
1877 nf = 0; // number of neighbouring filament points
1878 accrflag = 0; // if =1 all the neighbouring filaments are accreted
1879 for (i1 = 0; i1 < NV; i1++)
1880 neigh[i1] = 0; // number of neighbours
1881
1882 /* grid coordinates from the indices (sub-box coordinates) */
1883 INDEX_TO_COORD(frag_pos[iz], ibox, jbox, kbox, subbox.Lgwbl);
1884
1885 /* skips if the point is at the border (and PBCs are not active) */
1886 skip = 0;
1887 if (!subbox.pbc[_x_] && (ibox == 0 || ibox == subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] - 1))
1888 ++skip;
1889 if (!subbox.pbc[_y_] && (jbox == 0 || jbox == subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] - 1))
1890 ++skip;
1891 if (!subbox.pbc[_z_] && (kbox == 0 || kbox == subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] - 1))
1892 ++skip;
1893
1894 particle_name =
1895 COORD_TO_INDEX((long long)((ibox + subbox.stabl[_x_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_]) % MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_]),
1896 (long long)((jbox + subbox.stabl[_y_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_]) % MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_]),
1897 (long long)((kbox + subbox.stabl[_z_] + MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_]) % MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_]),
1898 MyGrids[0].GSglobal);
1899
1900 good_particle = (ibox >= subbox.safe[_x_] && ibox < subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] - subbox.safe[_x_] &&
1901 jbox >= subbox.safe[_y_] && jbox < subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] - subbox.safe[_y_] &&
1902 kbox >= subbox.safe[_z_] && kbox < subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] - subbox.safe[_z_]);
1903
1904 if (!skip)
1905 {
1906 peak_cond = 1;
1907 /* checks whether the neighbouring particles collapse later */
1908 for (nn = 0; nn < NV; nn++)
1909 {
1910 switch (nn)
1911 {
1912 case 0:
1913 i1 = (subbox.pbc[_x_] && ibox == 0 ? subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] - 1 : ibox - 1);
1914 j1 = jbox;
1915 k1 = kbox;
1916 break;
1917 case 1:
1918 i1 = (subbox.pbc[_x_] && ibox == subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] - 1 ? 0 : ibox + 1);
1919 j1 = jbox;
1920 k1 = kbox;
1921 break;
1922 case 2:
1923 i1 = ibox;
1924 j1 = (subbox.pbc[_y_] && jbox == 0 ? subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] - 1 : jbox - 1);
1925 k1 = kbox;
1926 break;
1927 case 3:
1928 i1 = ibox;
1929 j1 = (subbox.pbc[_y_] && jbox == subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] - 1 ? 0 : jbox + 1);
1930 k1 = kbox;
1931 break;
1932 case 4:
1933 i1 = ibox;
1934 j1 = jbox;
1935 k1 = (subbox.pbc[_z_] && kbox == 0 ? subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] - 1 : kbox - 1);
1936 break;
1937 case 5:
1938 i1 = ibox;
1939 j1 = jbox;
1940 k1 = (subbox.pbc[_z_] && kbox == subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] - 1 ? 0 : kbox + 1);
1941 break;
1942 }
1943
1944 pos = find_location(i1, j1, k1);
1945 if (pos >= 0)
1946 {
1947 neigh[nn] = group_ID[indices[pos]];
1948 peak_cond &= (frag[iz].Fmax > frag[indices[pos]].Fmax);
1949 }
1950 else
1951 neigh[nn] = 0;
1952
1953 if (neigh[nn] == FILAMENT)
1954 {
1955 neigh[nn] = 0;
1956 fil_list[nf][0] = i1;
1957 fil_list[nf][1] = j1;
1958 fil_list[nf][2] = k1;
1959 fil_list[nf][3] = indices[pos];
1960 nf++;
1961 }
1962 }
1963
1964 /* Cleans the list of neighbouring groups */
1965 clean_list(neigh);
1966
1967 /* Number of neighbouring groups */
1968 for (nn = neigrp = 0; nn < NV; nn++)
1969 if (neigh[nn] > FILAMENT)
1970 neigrp++;
1971 }
1972 else
1973 {
1974 peak_cond = 0;
1975 neigrp = 0;
1976 }
1977
1978 /* Is the point a peak? */
1979 if (peak_cond)
1980 {
1981 /**********************************************************************
1982 FIRST CASE: PEAK
1983 **********************************************************************/
1984 /* New group */
1985 ngroups++;
1986 groups[ngroups].t_peak = frag[iz].Fmax;
1987 groups[ngroups].t_appear = -1;
1988 groups[ngroups].t_merge = -1;
1989 groups[ngroups].Pos[0] = ibox + SHIFT;
1990 groups[ngroups].Pos[1] = jbox + SHIFT;
1991 groups[ngroups].Pos[2] = kbox + SHIFT;
1992 groups[ngroups].Vel[0] = frag[iz].Vel[0];
1993 groups[ngroups].Vel[1] = frag[iz].Vel[1];
1994 groups[ngroups].Vel[2] = frag[iz].Vel[2];
1995#ifdef TWO_LPT
1996 groups[ngroups].Vel_2LPT[0] = frag[iz].Vel_2LPT[0];
1997 groups[ngroups].Vel_2LPT[1] = frag[iz].Vel_2LPT[1];
1998 groups[ngroups].Vel_2LPT[2] = frag[iz].Vel_2LPT[2];
1999#ifdef THREE_LPT
2000 groups[ngroups].Vel_3LPT_1[0] = frag[iz].Vel_3LPT_1[0];
2001 groups[ngroups].Vel_3LPT_1[1] = frag[iz].Vel_3LPT_1[1];
2002 groups[ngroups].Vel_3LPT_1[2] = frag[iz].Vel_3LPT_1[2];
2003 groups[ngroups].Vel_3LPT_2[0] = frag[iz].Vel_3LPT_2[0];
2004 groups[ngroups].Vel_3LPT_2[1] = frag[iz].Vel_3LPT_2[1];
2005 groups[ngroups].Vel_3LPT_2[2] = frag[iz].Vel_3LPT_2[2];
2006#endif
2007#endif
2008 groups[ngroups].Mass = 1;
2009 groups[ngroups].name = particle_name;
2010 groups[ngroups].good = good_particle;
2011 groups[ngroups].point = iz;
2012 groups[ngroups].bottom = iz;
2013 groups[ngroups].ll = ngroups;
2014 groups[ngroups].halo_app = ngroups;
2015 group_ID[iz] = ngroups;
2016 linking_list[iz] = iz;
2017 }
2018 else if (neigrp == 1)
2019 {
2020
2021 /**********************************************************************
2022 SECOND CASE: 1 GROUP
2023 **********************************************************************/
2024 /* if the points touches only one group, check whether to accrete the point on it */
2025
2026 condition_for_accretion(1, ibox, jbox, kbox, iz, frag[iz].Fmax, neigh[0], &d2, &r2);
2027 if (d2 < r2)
2028 {
2029 accrflag = 1;
2030 to_group = neigh[0];
2031 accretion(to_group, ibox, jbox, kbox, iz, frag[iz].Fmax);
2032 }
2033 else
2034 {
2035 groups[FILAMENT].Mass++;
2036 group_ID[iz] = FILAMENT;
2037 linking_list[iz] = iz;
2038 }
2039 }
2040 else if (neigrp > 1)
2041 {
2042 /**********************************************************************
2043 THIRD CASE: >1 GROUP
2044 **********************************************************************/
2045 /* In this case the point touches more than one group */
2046
2047 best_ratio = pow(10. * subbox.Lgwbl[_x_], 2.0);
2048 accgrp = -1;
2049 for (ig1 = 0; ig1 < neigrp; ig1++)
2050 {
2051 condition_for_accretion(2, ibox, jbox, kbox, iz, frag[iz].Fmax, neigh[ig1], &d2, &r2);
2052 ratio = d2 / r2;
2053 if (ratio < 1.0 && ratio < best_ratio)
2054 {
2055 best_ratio = ratio;
2056 accgrp = ig1;
2057 }
2058 }
2059 if (accgrp >= 0)
2060 {
2061 accrflag = 1;
2062 to_group = neigh[accgrp];
2063 accretion(neigh[accgrp], ibox, jbox, kbox, iz, frag[iz].Fmax);
2064 }
2065 /* Then checks whether the groups must be merged together */
2066 nmerge = 0;
2067 for (ig1 = 0; ig1 < neigrp; ig1++)
2068 for (ig2 = 0; ig2 < ig1; ig2++)
2069 {
2070 merge[ig1][ig2] = 0;
2071 condition_for_merging(frag[iz].Fmax, neigh[ig1], neigh[ig2], &merge_flag);
2072 if (merge_flag)
2073 {
2074 merge[ig1][ig2] = 1;
2075 nmerge++;
2076 }
2077 }
2078
2079 /******************
2080 merging of groups!
2081 ******************/
2082
2083 /* The group number of the largest group is preserved */
2084
2085 if (nmerge > 0)
2086 {
2087 for (ig1 = 0; ig1 < neigrp; ig1++)
2088 for (ig2 = 0; ig2 < ig1; ig2++)
2089 if (merge[ig1][ig2] == 1 && neigh[ig1] != neigh[ig2])
2090 {
2091 if (groups[neigh[ig1]].Mass > groups[neigh[ig2]].Mass)
2092 {
2093 merge_groups(neigh[ig1], neigh[ig2], frag[iz].Fmax);
2094 large = neigh[ig1];
2095 small = neigh[ig2];
2096 }
2097 else
2098 {
2099 merge_groups(neigh[ig2], neigh[ig1], frag[iz].Fmax);
2100 small = neigh[ig1];
2101 large = neigh[ig2];
2102 }
2103 if (to_group == small)
2104 to_group = large;
2105 for (ig3 = 0; ig3 < neigrp; ig3++)
2106 if (neigh[ig3] == small)
2107 neigh[ig3] = large;
2108 }
2109 }
2110
2111 /* If relevant, it tries again to accrete the particle */
2112
2113 if (accgrp == -1)
2114 {
2115 clean_list(neigh);
2116
2117 /* Number of neighbouring groups */
2118 for (nn = neigrp = 0; nn < NV; nn++)
2119 if (neigh[nn] > FILAMENT)
2120 neigrp++;
2121
2122 best_ratio = pow(10. * subbox.Lgwbl[_x_], 2.0);
2123 accgrp = -1;
2124 for (ig1 = 0; ig1 < neigrp; ig1++)
2125 {
2126 condition_for_accretion(3, ibox, jbox, kbox, iz, frag[iz].Fmax, neigh[ig1], &d2, &r2);
2127 ratio = d2 / r2;
2128 if (ratio < best_ratio)
2129 {
2130 best_ratio = ratio;
2131 accgrp = ig1;
2132 }
2133 }
2134
2135 if (best_ratio < 1)
2136 {
2137 accrflag = 1;
2138 to_group = neigh[accgrp];
2139 accretion(neigh[accgrp], ibox, jbox, kbox, iz, frag[iz].Fmax);
2140 }
2141 else
2142 {
2143 /* If the point has not been accreted at all: */
2144 groups[FILAMENT].Mass++;
2145 group_ID[iz] = FILAMENT;
2146 linking_list[iz] = iz;
2147 }
2148 }
2149 }
2150 else
2151 {
2152 /**********************************************************************
2153 FOURTH CASE: FILAMENTS
2154 **********************************************************************/
2155 groups[FILAMENT].Mass++;
2156 group_ID[iz] = FILAMENT;
2157 linking_list[iz] = iz;
2158
2159 /* end of cases */
2160 }
2161
2162 /* Checks whether to accrete all the neighbouring filaments;
2163 first it checks conditions for all filament particles,
2164 then it accretes those that should */
2165 if (accrflag && nf && !skip)
2166 {
2167 for (ifil = 0; ifil < nf; ifil++)
2168 {
2169 condition_for_accretion(4, fil_list[ifil][0], fil_list[ifil][1], fil_list[ifil][2],
2170 fil_list[ifil][3], frag[iz].Fmax, to_group, &d2, &r2);
2171 if (d2 < r2)
2172 fil_list[ifil][3] *= -1;
2173 }
2174
2175 for (ifil = 0; ifil < nf; ifil++)
2176 if (fil_list[ifil][3] < 0)
2177 {
2178 fil_list[ifil][3] *= -1;
2179 accretion(to_group, fil_list[ifil][0], fil_list[ifil][1],
2180 fil_list[ifil][2], fil_list[ifil][3], frag[iz].Fmax);
2181 groups[FILAMENT].Mass--;
2182 }
2183 }
2184
2185 /************************************************************************
2186 END OF DO-CYCLE ON COLLAPSED POINTS
2187 ************************************************************************/
2188
2189 /* Fraction of steps done */
2190 if (!ThisTask && !(iz % nstep_p))
2191 printf("[%s] *** %3d%% done, F = %6.2f, z = %6.2f\n", fdate(),
2192 iz / (nstep_p) * 20, frag[iz].Fmax,
2193 frag[iz].Fmax - 1.0);
2194 }
2195
2196 return 0;
2197}

481
482 /* Task 0 checks that the DumpProducts/summary exists and is compatible with the present run */
483 if (!ThisTask)
484 {
485 sprintf(fname, "%ssummary", params.DumpDir);
486 file = fopen(fname, "r");
487 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, file);
488 sscanf(buf, "%d", &myNTasks);
489 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, file);
490 sscanf(buf, "%d", &myRandomSeed);
491 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, file);
492 sscanf(buf, "%d", &myGridSize);
493 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, file);
494 sscanf(buf, "%d", &myPDlength);
495 fclose(file);
496
497 int error = 0;
498 if (NTasks != myNTasks)
499 {
500 printf("ERROR: the number of tasks in %s does not match - %d vs %d\n",
501 fname, myNTasks, NTasks);
502 error++;
503 }
504 if (params.RandomSeed != myRandomSeed)
505 {
506 printf("ERROR: the random seed in %s does not match - %d vs %d\n",
507 fname, myRandomSeed, params.RandomSeed);
508 error++;
509 }
510 if (params.GridSize[0] != myGridSize)
511 {
512 printf("ERROR: the grid size in %s does not match - %d vs %d\n",
513 fname, myGridSize, params.GridSize[0]);
514 error++;
515 }
516 if (myPDlength != (int)sizeof(product_data))
517 {
518 printf("ERROR: the length of product_data in %s does not match - %d vs %d\n",
519 fname, myPDlength, (int)sizeof(product_data));
520 error++;
521 }
522 if (error)
523 return 1;
524
525 /* reads and broadcasts true variances */
526 sprintf(fname, "%sTrueVariance", params.DumpDir);
527 file = fopen(fname, "rb");
528 if (file == 0x0)
529 {
530 printf("ERROR on Task 0: could not open file %s\n", fname);
531 return 1;
532 }
533 fread(Smoothing.TrueVariance, sizeof(double), Smoothing.Nsmooth, file);
534 fclose(file);
535 }
536 MPI_Bcast(Smoothing.TrueVariance, Smoothing.Nsmooth, MPI_DOUBLE, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
537
538 /* each task reads a separate dump file */
539 sprintf(fname, "%sTask.%d", params.DumpDir, ThisTask);
540 file = fopen(fname, "rb");
541 if (file == 0x0)
542 {
543 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not open file %s\n", ThisTask, fname);
544 return 1;
545 }
546
547 // NOTE: with LEAPFROG one needs to read in also kdensity and kvectors

549 fclose(file);
550
551 return 0;

299 printf("Reading parameters from file %s\n", params.ParameterFile);
300 fflush(stdout);
301
302 if ((fd = fopen(params.ParameterFile, "r")))
303 {
304 while (!feof(fd))
305 {
306 *buf = 0;
307 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, fd);
308 number_of_fields = sscanf(buf, "%s %s %s %s", buf1, buf2, buf3, buf4);
309 if (number_of_fields < 1)
310 continue;
311
312 if (buf1[0] == '#' || buf1[0] == '%')
313 continue;
314
315 /* searches for a match with the tag list */
316 for (i = 0, j = -1; i < nt; i++)
317 if (strcmp(buf1, tag[i]) == 0)
318 {
319 j = i;
320 tag[i][0] = 0;
321 break;
322 }
323
324 if (j >= 0)
325 {
326 switch (id[j])
327 {
328 case DOUBLE:
329 if (number_of_fields < 2)
330 j = -10;
331 else
332 *((double *)addr[j]) = atof(buf2);
333 break;
334
335 case STRING:
336 if (number_of_fields < 2)
337 j = -10;
338 else
339 strcpy(addr[j], buf2);
340 break;
341
342 case INT:
343 if (number_of_fields < 2)
344 j = -10;
345 else
346 *((int *)addr[j]) = atoi(buf2);
347 break;
348
349 case INT_SKIP:
350 if (number_of_fields < 2)
351 j = -10;
352 else
353 *((int *)addr[j]) = atoi(buf2);
354 break;
355
356 case INT_SKIP_DEF:
357 if (number_of_fields < 2)
358 j = -10;
359 else
360 *((int *)addr[j]) = atoi(buf2);
361 break;
362
363 case INT3:
364 if (number_of_fields < 4)
365 j = -10;
366 else
367 {
368 *((int *)addr[j]) = atoi(buf2);
369 *((int *)addr[j] + 1) = atoi(buf3);
370 *((int *)addr[j] + 2) = atoi(buf4);
371 }
372 break;
373
374 case DOUBLE3:
375 if (number_of_fields < 4)
376 j = -10;
377 else
378 {
379 *((double *)addr[j]) = atof(buf2);
380 *((double *)addr[j] + 1) = atof(buf3);
381 *((double *)addr[j] + 2) = atof(buf4);
382 }
383 break;
384
385 case LOGICAL:
386 *((int *)addr[j]) = 1;
387 break;
388
389 default:
390 break;
391 }
392
393 if (j < 0)
394 {
395 printf("ERROR on task 0: file %s, Tag %s has no argument.\n",
396 params.ParameterFile, buf1);
397 fflush(stdout);
398 return 1;
399 }
400 }
401 else
402 {
403 printf("ERROR on task 0: file %s, Tag %s is unknown.\n",
404 params.ParameterFile, buf1);
405 fflush(stdout);
406 return 1;
407 }
408 }
409 fclose(fd);
410 }
411 else
412 {
413 printf("ERROR: Parameter file %s not found.\n", params.ParameterFile);
414 return 2;
415 }
416
417 /* Checks that all parameters are found */
418 for (i = 0; i < nt; i++)
419 {
420 if (*tag[i])
421 {
422 if (id[i] == LOGICAL || id[i] == INT_SKIP || id[i] == DOUBLE3)
423 *((int *)addr[i]) = 0;
424 else if (id[i] != INT_SKIP_DEF)
425 {
426 printf("ERROR on task 0: I miss a value for tag '%s' in parameter file '%s'.\n", tag[i], params.ParameterFile);
427 fflush(stdout);
428 return 1;
429 }
430 }
431 }
432
433 /* Now opens and reads the list of wanted outputs */
434 outputs.n = 0;
435 if ((fd = fopen(params.OutputList, "r")))
436 while (!feof(fd))
437 {
438 *buf = 0;
439 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, fd);
440 if (buf[0] != '#' && buf[0] != '%' && sscanf(buf, "%lf", &z) != EOF)
441 outputs.z[outputs.n++] = z;
442 if (outputs.n == MAXOUTPUTS)
443 {
444 printf("ERROR on task 0: too many output redshifts in file %s\n", params.OutputList);
445 printf(" increase MAXOUTPUTS in pinocchio.h\n");
446 fflush(stdout);
447 return 1;
448 }
449 }
450 else
451 {
452 printf("Error on task 0: file %s not found\n", params.OutputList);
453 fflush(stdout);
454 return 1;
455 }
456 fclose(fd);
457 outputs.zlast = outputs.z[outputs.n - 1];
458
459 if (outputs.n <= 0)
460 {
461 printf("ERROR on task 0: no valid lines found in file %s\n", params.OutputList);
462 fflush(stdout);
463 return 1;
464 }
465
466 params.GridSize[1] = params.GridSize[2] = params.GridSize[0];
467
468#ifdef MASS_MAPS
469 /* Validate MassMapNSIDE */
470 if (params.MassMapNSIDE <= 0) {
471 printf("ERROR on task 0: MassMapNSIDE must be > 0 when MASS_MAPS is compiled.\n");
472 fflush(stdout);
473 return 1;
474 }
475 if ( (params.MassMapNSIDE & (params.MassMapNSIDE - 1)) != 0) {
476 printf("ERROR on task 0: MassMapNSIDE=%d is not a power of two.\n", params.MassMapNSIDE);
477 fflush(stdout);
478 return 1;
479 }
480#endif
481 }
482
483 /* processor 0 broadcasts the parameters to all other processors */
484 MPI_Bcast(&params, sizeof(param_data), MPI_BYTE, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
485 MPI_Bcast(&internal, sizeof(internal_data), MPI_BYTE, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD); // PERCHE' QUI?
486 MPI_Bcast(&outputs.n, sizeof(output_data), MPI_BYTE, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
487
488 return 0;
489}

52 /(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z;
53 MyGrids[ThisGrid].CellSize = MyGrids[ThisGrid].BoxSize/(double)MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
54
55 L=MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
56 M=MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_y;
57 N=MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z;
58
59 /* get local data size and allocate */
60 alloc_local = fftw_mpi_local_size_3d_transposed(L, M, N/2+1, MPI_COMM_WORLD,
61 &local_n0, &local_0_start,
62 &local_n1, &local_1_start);
63
64 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
65 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_y;
66 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_z = local_n0;
67
68 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_x = 0;
69 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_y = 0;
70 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_z = local_0_start;
71
72 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k_x = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_x;
73 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k_y = local_n1;
74 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k_z = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal_z;
75
76 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k_x = 0;
77 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k_y = local_1_start;
78 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k_z = 0;
79
80 MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size_fft = 2*alloc_local;
81 MyGrids[ThisGrid].total_local_size = MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_x * MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_y * MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_z;
82
83 /* this gives is the number of unused x-grid points in rvector_fft */
84 if (MyGrids[0].GSglobal_x%2)
85 MyGrids[0].off=1;
86 else
87 MyGrids[0].off=2;
88
89 return 0;
90}

1039 subbox.safe[_y_] = (subbox.pbc[_y_] ? 0 : (BB > MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] / 2 - subbox.Lgrid[_y_] / 2 - 1 ? MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_] / 2 - subbox.Lgrid[_y_] / 2 - 1 : BB));
1040 subbox.safe[_z_] = (subbox.pbc[_z_] ? 0 : (BB > MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_] / 2 - subbox.Lgrid[_z_] / 2 - 1 ? MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_] / 2 - subbox.Lgrid[_z_] / 2 - 1 : BB));
1041
1042 // #endif
1043
1044 subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] = subbox.Lgrid[_x_] + 2 * subbox.safe[_x_];
1045 subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] = subbox.Lgrid[_y_] + 2 * subbox.safe[_y_];
1046 subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] = subbox.Lgrid[_z_] + 2 * subbox.safe[_z_];
1047 unsigned long long MySize = (long long)subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] * (long long)subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] * (long long)subbox.Lgwbl[_z_];
1048 while (MySize > (unsigned long long)1 << 31)
1049 {
1050 subbox.safe[_x_] -= 1;
1051 subbox.safe[_y_] -= 1;
1052 subbox.safe[_z_] -= 1;
1053 subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] = subbox.Lgrid[_x_] + 2 * subbox.safe[_x_];
1054 subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] = subbox.Lgrid[_y_] + 2 * subbox.safe[_y_];
1055 subbox.Lgwbl[_z_] = subbox.Lgrid[_z_] + 2 * subbox.safe[_z_];
1056 MySize = (unsigned long long)subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] * (unsigned long long)subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] * (unsigned long long)subbox.Lgwbl[_z_];
1057 }
1058
1059 subbox.start[_x_] = find_start(MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_x_], subbox.nbox[_x_], subbox.mybox[_x_]);
1060 subbox.start[_y_] = find_start(MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_y_], subbox.nbox[_y_], subbox.mybox[_y_]);
1061 subbox.start[_z_] = find_start(MyGrids[0].GSglobal[_z_], subbox.nbox[_z_], subbox.mybox[_z_]);
1062
1063 subbox.stabl[_x_] = subbox.start[_x_] - subbox.safe[_x_];
1064 subbox.stabl[_y_] = subbox.start[_y_] - subbox.safe[_y_];
1065 subbox.stabl[_z_] = subbox.start[_z_] - subbox.safe[_z_];
1066
1067 /*
1068 Npart: total number of particles in the whole sub-volume
1069 Ngood: total number of particles in the well reconstructed region
1070 Npredpeaks: a guess of the maximum number of peaks in the subbox
1071 Nalloc: number of particles for which memory has been allocated (set in organize_main_memory)
1072 Nstored: number of actually stored particles
1073 */
1074
1075 subbox.Npart = subbox.Lgwbl[_x_] * subbox.Lgwbl[_y_] * subbox.Lgwbl[_z_];
1076 subbox.Ngood = subbox.Lgrid[_x_] * subbox.Lgrid[_y_] * subbox.Lgrid[_z_];
1077 /* this is a prediction of the number of peaks that will be found */
1078 subbox.PredNpeaks = (int)(MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask / 6 * params.PredPeakFactor);
1079 subbox.Nstored = 0;
1080 /* this is the size of frag_map*/
1081 subbox.maplength = subbox.Npart / UINTLEN + (subbox.Npart % UINTLEN != 0);
1082 if ((subbox.Nalloc = organize_main_memory()) == 0)
1083 {
1084 fflush(stdout);
1085 if (!ThisTask)
1086 printf("organize_main_memory returned an invalid Nalloc, exiting\n");
1087 return 1;
1088 }
1089
1090 /* messagges */
1091 if (!ThisTask)
1092 {
1093 printf("\n");
1094 printf("FRAGMENTATION:\n");
1095 printf("Reference number of particles: %d\n", MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask);
1096 printf("Requested bytes per particle: %d\n", (int)params.MaxMemPerParticle);
1097 printf("Number of sub-boxes per dimension: %d %d %d\n", subbox.nbox[_x_], subbox.nbox[_y_], subbox.nbox[_z_]);
1098 printf("Periodic boundary conditions: %d %d %d\n", subbox.pbc[_x_], subbox.pbc[_y_], subbox.pbc[_z_]);
1099 printf("Core 0 will work on a grid: %d %d %d\n", subbox.Lgwbl[_x_], subbox.Lgwbl[_y_], subbox.Lgwbl[_z_]);
1100 printf("The resolved box will be: %d %d %d\n", subbox.Lgrid[_x_], subbox.Lgrid[_y_], subbox.Lgrid[_z_]);
1101 printf("Boundary layer: %d %d %d\n", subbox.safe[_x_], subbox.safe[_y_], subbox.safe[_z_]);
1102 printf("Boundary layer factor: %f\n", params.BoundaryLayerFactor);
1103 printf("Number of total particles for core 0: %d\n", subbox.Npart);
1104 printf("Number of good particles for core 0: %d\n", subbox.Ngood);
1105 printf("Particles that core 0 will allocate: %d\n", subbox.Nalloc);
1106 printf("Allowed overhead for boundary layer: %f\n", (float)subbox.Nalloc / (float)MyGrids[0].ParticlesPerTask);
1107 printf("Largest halo expected in this box at z=%f: %e Msun\n",
1108 outputs.zlast, params.Largest);
1109 printf(" its Lagrangian size: %f Mpc (%6.2f grid points)\n", size, sizeG);
1110 printf(" this requires a boundary layer of %6.2f grid points \n", sizeG * params.BoundaryLayerFactor);
1111
1112#ifndef BL_GRANDISSIMA
1113 if ((!subbox.pbc[_x_] && params.BoundaryLayerFactor * sizeG > subbox.safe[_x_]) ||
1114 (!subbox.pbc[_y_] && params.BoundaryLayerFactor * sizeG > subbox.safe[_y_]) ||
1115 (!subbox.pbc[_z_] && params.BoundaryLayerFactor * sizeG > subbox.safe[_z_]))
1116 {
1117 printf("WARNING: the boundary layer on some dimension is smaller than the predicted size of the largest halos\n");
1118 printf(" times the BoundaryLayerFactor, the most massive halos may be inaccurate\n");
1119 }
1120#endif
1121 }
1122
1123 /* initialization of quantities required by compute_mf */
1124 if (params.OutputInH100)
1125 mf.hfactor = params.Hubble100;
1126 else
1127 mf.hfactor = 1.0;
1128 mf.hfactor4 = pow(mf.hfactor, 4.);
1129 mf.vol = (double)MyGrids[0].Ntotal * pow(params.InterPartDist, 3.0);
1130 mf.mmin = log10(params.MinHaloMass * params.ParticleMass) - 0.001 * DELTAM;
1131 mf.mmax = log10(params.Largest) + 3.0 * DELTAM;
1132 mf.NBIN = (int)((mf.mmax - mf.mmin) / DELTAM) + 1;
1133 mf.ninbin = (int *)calloc(mf.NBIN, sizeof(int));
1134 mf.ninbin_local = (int *)calloc(mf.NBIN, sizeof(int));
1135 mf.massinbin = (double *)calloc(mf.NBIN, sizeof(double));
1136 mf.massinbin_local = (double *)calloc(mf.NBIN, sizeof(double));
1137
1138 /* messages */
1139 if (!ThisTask)
1140 {
1141 printf("\nThe mass function will be computed from Log M=%f to Log M=%f (%d bins)\n",
1142 mf.mmin, mf.mmax, mf.NBIN);
1143 printf("\n");
1144 fflush(stdout);
1145 }
1146
1147 return 0;
1148}

2087 /* Radius corresponding to mass m
2088 m: M_sun
2089
2090 DIMENSION: Mpc

2094 {
2095 case 0:
2096 return pow(m / pow(2.0 * PI, 1.5) / MatterDensity, 0.3333333333333333);
2097 break;
2098 case 1:
2099 return pow(m / (6.0 * PI * PI * MatterDensity), 0.3333333333333333);
2100 break;
2101 case 2:
2102 return pow(m / (4.0 * PI * MatterDensity / 3.0), 0.3333333333333333);
2103 break;
2104 default:
2105 return 0.;
2106 break;

◆ virial()

PRODFLOAT virial ( int  mass,
PRODFLOAT  F,
int  flag 
)

Definition at line 1010 of file build_groups.c.

1011{
1012 /* This function is at the root of the decision of whether particles
1013 should be accreted and halos should be merged. For a group of a
1014 given mass (in number of particles) it returns the SQUARE of its
1015 "virial radius", that is the capture radius for accretion and
1016 merging events.
1017 flag=1 for accretion, flag=1 for merging.
1018 */
1019
1020 PRODFLOAT r2, rlag, sigmaD;
1021
1022 /* the Lagrangian radius in grid units is just the cubic root of the
1023 halo mass */
1024 rlag = pow((double)mass, 0.333333333333333);
1025 int S = Smoothing.Nsmooth - 1;
1026 /* this is the linear density rms on the grid */
1027 sigmaD = sqrt(Smoothing.TrueVariance[S]) *
1028#ifdef SCALE_DEPENDENT
1029 GrowingMode((double)F - 1., Smoothing.k_GM_dens[S]); // ATTENZIONE, QUESTO NON E` DEL TUTTO CORRETTO IN MG
1030#else
1031 GrowingMode((double)F - 1., params.k_for_GM);
1032#endif
1033 if (!flag)
1034 /* merging */
1035 r2 = pow(f_m * pow(rlag, espo) * (sigmaD > sigmaD0 ? 1.0 + (sigmaD - sigmaD0) * f_rm : 1.0), 2.0) + pow(f_200 * rlag, 2.0);
1036 else
1037 /* accretion */

1051 {

1053 // Check if interpolation has already been done for this rlag
1054 if (interpolation_Done == 0)
1055 {
1056

1059 double r_lower = Smoothing.Radius[iradius];
1060 double r_upper = Smoothing.Radius[iradius - 1];

1062 double k_upper = Smoothing.k_GM_dens[iradius - 1];

1064 // Reverse linear interpolation formula

1075

1092#endif

1094 return r2;
